sections.contactText: You can contact me through my social networks such as Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp for more information.

landing.therapyIntro: Psychoanalytic therapy sessions tailored to your needs, available remotely and in person.

therapyCards.title: Online therapy
therapyCards.text: Remote sessions available worldwide, with the same warmth and professionalism from your own space.

therapyCards.title: In-person therapy
therapyCards.text: Sessions in Cali, Colombia. A safe and welcoming physical space for your process.

therapyCards.title: Standardized tests
therapyCards.text: Assessment tools and certified processes to guide evaluation and support your progress.
